Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Common Start All cases start with OR MS QS This looks like a strict sequence at the beginning Assembly Quality Loop After QS we see AS Assembly Then IQC In line Quality Check appears Often AS and IQC alternate AS IQC AS IQC Case 4 skips IQC entirely after AS Case 3 has multiple IQC without AS in between sometimes Testing Phase Case 1 TST RT TST Case 2 TST Case 3 TST RT TST Case 4 TST Case 5 TST RT TST RT TST This is clearly a loop structure Execute TST Then either exit or RT then TST Packaging Phase Case 1 PK LB Case 2 PK LB skipped Case 3 PK LB Case 4 PK LB Case 5 PK LB LB is optional Distribution Phase All cases DP D Strict sequence

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Pattern observed AS happens Then IQC happens If IQC fails implied AS happens again Core sequence AS IQC Loop condition If IQC is done can go back to AS Case 4 shows AS TST directly So IQC is optional or part of a loop that can be exited This suggests a loop structure AS IQC Case 4 AS TST AS mandatory All cases have at least one AS

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: If we use AS IQC Iteration 1 AS Choice Exit OR IQC AS If Exit Done If Loop IQC AS Next Iteration AS Choice Exit OR IQC AS Lets check Case 1 AS IQC AS TST Start Loop Execute AS Choose Loop path Execute IQC then AS Execute AS Choose Exit path Result AS IQC AS Matches Lets check Case 4 AS TST Start Loop Execute AS Choose Exit path Result AS Matches loop test OperatorPOWL LOOP TST RT choice lb OperatorPOWL XOR LB skip

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 AS IQC AS OK Case 4 AS OK Case 3 AS IQC IQC AS This is tricky IQC IQC The log shows IQC twice in a row in Case 3 Standard Loop AS IQC implies AS IQC AS It doesnt naturally support IQC IQC without AS in between Case 5 TST RT TST RT TST Loop TST RT 1 TST Choice Loop RT TST 2 RT TST Choice Loop RT TST 3 RT TST Choice Exit Result TST RT TST RT TST Matches Case 5 Case 2 TST Choice Exit Matches PK is mandatory LB is optional Structure PK X LB Silent LB optional X PK LB PK Or PK followed by X LB Silent

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Case 3 IQC repetition AS IQC IQC AS My model AS IQC misses the double IQC To be more accurate IQC itself could be a loop IQC Silent No thats over engineering Alternative IQC is part of the loop body B in A B If B PO IQC IQC Then AS IQC IQC AS But IQC is a single activity label Lets keep it simple AS IQC is the standard interpretation of Retry I will stick to AS IQC as the primary pattern modeling specific noise double IQC in one case might overfit the model

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Overall Flow 1 OR MS QS Strict Sequence 2 loop assembly AS IQC 3 loop test TST RT 4 PK LB Optional 5 DP D StrictPartialOrder requires nodes in constructor and edges added via order add edge Top level nodes node OR node MS node QS loop assembly loop test node PK choice lb node DP node D Edges OR MS MS QS QS loop assembly loop assembly loop test loop test PK PK choice lb choice lb DP DP D

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Given the constraints of the prompts POWL definition I need to fit the data into Transition XOR LOOP PO modeling the intended process logic is usually preferred over fitting every noise point perfectly in a high level model The core logic is Assemble Check Retry Assemble I will proceed with AS IQC as it captures the dominant retry logic prioritize the clear loop patterns TST RT and AS IQC retry

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 4 No IQC AS IQC handles this Exit after first AS LB Skip Handled by X LB Silent RT Loop Handled by TST RT Concurrency The log is sequential I will use StrictPartialOrder to enforce the sequence edges Final Plan Define Transitions Define Silent Transition Define Loop Operators Assembly Testing Define Choice Operator Labeling Define Root StrictPartialOrder Define Order Edges
